title: Totem of Undying Kisuke Urahara

# 🟢 Bleach Totem – Kisuke Urahara

Add intelligence, mystery, and strategy to your Minecraft survival.
This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a pixel-art design of **Kisuke Urahara**, featuring his iconic hat and calm expression — perfect for players who appreciate subtle power.

### ✨ Features

- ✔️ Custom Totem of Undying texture – Kisuke Urahara
- ✔️ Recognizable pixel-art silhouette
- ✔️ Vanilla-friendly (no OptiFine)
- ✔️ Compatible with 1.8 → 1.21+
- ✔️ Safe for servers & multiplayer

### 📥 Installation

1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it inside your resourcepacks folder
3. Activate in Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs
4. Charge into danger with Inosuke’s fearless spirit.

### 📌 Notes

- Unofficial fan project inspired by Bleach.

### 🖌️ Credits
